name: Tom Perez
subject: re: our first day on tour
body:
Let's get to work
---
**Pitch in $10 or whatever you can to help elect Democrats:
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9cc/4067b0a/2e99d7219/7e729efb/663645018/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/Our-Party-Our-Future-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170417_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170417_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170417_tp_v2s1")****
Today is the day! Bernie Sanders and I are headed to Portland, Maine where we'll kick off our big cross-country tour tonight.

We're covering a lot of ground this week, and I couldn't be more excited to talk to Democrats all across the country about how we're coming together as Democrats and fighting back.

We know we've got some tough fights ahead of us. Donald Trump's administration has been an unmitigated disaster, and we're still not even 100 days in.

Hours after being sworn in, Trump made it harder for first-time homebuyers to buy a home. Days later, he made it harder for families to save for retirement.

He's targeted immigrants and torn apart families, and he tried to ram through a health care bill that would have kicked 24 million Americans off their insurance.

Donald Trump is shaking American families down, and we're not going to let him get away with it. It's going to be hard work, but if we each stand up and do our part, I'm confident that we can stand up to Donald Trump and his lackeys in Congress.

But we can't do it without you. So before I take the stage tonight, I'm asking you to step up today by pitching in $10 or whatever you can to help Democrats fight back against Trump and the GOP.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9cc/4067b0a/2e99d7219/7e729ef9/663645018/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170417_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170417_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170417_tp_v2s1")

[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9cc/4067b0a/2e99d7219/7e729e87/663645018/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170417_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170417_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170417_tp_v2s1")

[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9cc/4067b0a/2e99d7219/7e729e85/663645018/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/our-party-our-future?express_lane=true&amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20170417_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170417_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170417_tp_v2s1")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9cc/4067b0a/2e99d7219/7e729e82/663645018/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/Our-Party-Our-Future-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170417_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170417_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170417_tp_v2s1")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9cc/4067b0a/2e99d7219/7e729e8d/663645018/VEsHAA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170417_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170417_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170417_tp_v2s1"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9cc/4067b0a/2e99d7219/7e729e8a/663645018/VEsHAw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170417_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170417_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170417_tp_v2s1"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9cc/4067b0a/2e99d7219/7e729e8b/663645018/VEsHAg/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=17+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170417_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170417_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170417_tp_v2s1") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c9cc/4067b0a/2e99d7219/7e729e88/663645018/VEsHDQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=18+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170417_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170417_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170417_tp_v2s1"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

body:
Help Take Indiana to the Next Level
View this email in your browser (http://us15.campaign-archive2.com/?u=67f69d7e14c70b2763b9502bf&id=a9b5de5024&e=8b11e0c120)

** Let's give our kids a head start.
------------------------------------------------------------

Listen to Governor Holcomb talk about Pre-kindergarten Education

Pre-K education is paramount for taking Indiana to the Next Level. For low-income students, pre-kindergarten provides the increased support and attention that can make a difference in their academic and social success for years down the road. This investment will build a diverse and well-educated workforce. Multiple studies conducted by economists from around the country report anywhere from a $4-1 to a $12-1 return on investment in high-quality early childhood education programs. Our state has the ability to continue this forward momentum and build upon the pilot program that we have, On My Way Pre-K and at least double it.

name: Russ Feingold, LegitPAC
subject: What we can do without an amendment
body:
This is a real opportunity to change the way candidates campaign and restore legitimacy to our democracy. | [](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c9/1c469400/2d81ff4/3549568/941374685/VEsH/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/20170412-electoral-college_LP?source=20170417_r4w_NPV_petition&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170417_r4w_NPV_petition") Friend, I want to tell you a little bit more about how we can change the Electoral College _without_ a constitutional amendment. You see, the constitution specifies that each individual state chooses how to allocate its own delegates to the Electoral College. In practice, most states allocate all their delegates to the candidate that wins the state. But it doesn't have to be that way. If enough states to represent an Electoral College majority pledge to allocate their delegates to the winner of the national popular vote, then it doesn't matter how the rest of the states allocate their delegates -- the candidate who wins the most votes nationwide will always become president. Voters in non-swing states will have a voice again, and our president will be elected by a legitimate national majority every time. This is absolutely worth fighting for. [_**Sign LegitAction 's petition today to show you support state-by-state efforts to make sure our next president is the candidate who wins the most votes.**_](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c9/1c469400/2d81ff4/3549569/941374685/VEsE/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/20170412-electoral-college_LP?source=20170417_r4w_NPV_petition&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=2+-+Sign+LegitActionrsquos+petition+today+to&utm_campaign=20170417_r4w_NPV_petition") It takes 270 Electoral College votes to pick a president; states representing 165 Electoral College votes have already joined the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact. Right now, legislation is pending in Connecticut to join the compact. LegitAction is supporting local activists pushing for passage there and doing everything we can to help. But the compact doesn't take effect in each state until enough other states have joined to tip the election. We need to build support and awareness nationwide in order to encourage more states to join. Our government is only legitimate to the extent it reflects the will of the people, and this is a key way to ensure the voices of people throughout the country matter. [_**Help make our presidential elections legitimate. Sign on today to show your support for the national popular vote.**_](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c9/1c469400/2d81ff4/3549566/941374685/VEsF/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/20170412-electoral-college_LP?source=20170417_r4w_NPV_petition&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=3+-+Help+make+our+presidential+elections+leg&utm_campaign=20170417_r4w_NPV_petition") This is a real opportunity to not just change the way candidates campaign, but to help ensure our country always elects a president who wins a legitimate majority of the country's votes. We must work to seize it. Thank you for signing on to help seize this opportunity, Russ Feingold | [SIGN ON](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46c9/1c469400/2d81ff4/3549567/941374685/VEsC/ "https://act.legitaction.com/sign/20170412-electoral-college_LP?source=20170417_r4w_NPV_petition&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=4+-+SIGN+ON&utm_campaign=20170417_r4w_NPV_petition")

Between now and Saturday night, we'll cover over 6,000 miles. (That's a lot!) And we're going to use every second we have to get our message out to voters and get Democrats organized to win elections at every level.

So when we finish our final rally in Las Vegas on Saturday, we'll really just be getting started. If we're going to keep doing this work so we can organize our grassroots and turn our energy and passion into victories, we have to keep our foot on the gas all the way.

We can win local elections, take back Congress next year, and reclaim the White House in 2020 -- but not without your help. So I'm calling on you to step up, dig deep, and pitch in whatever you can to help Bernie and me get the word out, rebuild our party, and get ready to win.

name: Jeanie Forrester
subject: URGENT: We need your support tomorrow at the State House!
body:
Dear Derek,

Please join your fellow Republicans in Concord tomorrow morning
(April 18) at 10:00 AM to support Election Law reform by
supporting SB3 at the committee hearing in the State House of
Representatives Hall.

This bill would require voters in New Hampshire to be residents
of the state and provide documentation that they are residents.
Forty-seven states and D.C. require voters to be residents,
provide proof of residency, and be a resident for a period of
time before being allowed to vote. In Massachusetts, voters who
cannot provide proof of residency before the polls close, lose
their ability to vote in that day's election.

Because of how lax our laws are, people can vote in New Hampshire
who are not residents of the state. The idea that voters should
be residents of the political subdivision where they vote is not
novel or "unconstitutional."

* In 1972, the Supreme Court stated that “States have the power
to require that voters be bona fide residents of the relevant
political subdivision.”

* In 2016, over 6,500 people registered to vote here using out of
state driver's licenses.

SB3 has passed the Senate and is now being reviewed

by the House Election Law Committee.

If you want to end loopholes in our election law, please show
your support for SB3 tomorrow. Please sign in support of Senate
Bill 3 so we can urge our legislators to pass this important
bill. The Democrats are working hard to defeat this legislation
and have pulled in out-of-state special interest groups to target
the Republican bill sponsors. We must show a unified front and
support SB3!

FULL DETAILS:
House committee hearing on SB3

Tuesday, April 18th, 2017
10:00 AM
NH State House of Representatives Hall
NH State House, 107 N. Main Street, Concord, NH 03303

Sincerely,

clean_body: Dear Derek, Please join your fellow Republicans in Concord tomorrow morning (April 18) at 10:00 AM to support Election Law reform by supporting SB3 at the committee hearing in the State House of Representatives Hall. This bill would require voters in New Hampshire to be residents of the state and provide documentation that they are residents. Forty-seven states and D.C. require voters to be residents, provide proof of residency, and be a resident for a period of time before being allowed to vote. In Massachusetts, voters who cannot provide proof of residency before the polls close, lose their ability to vote in that day's election. Because of how lax our laws are, people can vote in New Hampshire who are not residents of the state. The idea that voters should be residents of the political subdivision where they vote is not novel or "unconstitutional." In 1972, the Supreme Court stated that “States have the power to require that voters be bona fide residents of the relevant political subdivision.” In 2016, over 6,500 people registered to vote here using out of state driver's licenses. SB3 has passed the Senate and is now being reviewed by the House Election Law Committee. If you want to end loopholes in our election law, please show your support for SB3 tomorrow. Please sign in support of Senate Bill 3 so we can urge our legislators to pass this important bill. The Democrats are working hard to defeat this legislation and have pulled in out-of-state special interest groups to target the Republican bill sponsors. We must show a unified front and support SB3! FULL DETAILS: House committee hearing on SB3 Tuesday, April 18th, 2017 10:00 AM NH State House of Representatives Hall NH State House, 107 N. Main Street, Concord, NH 03303 Sincerely, Jeanie Forrester Chairman Share your Robly campaign on Facebook ( ) Share your Robly campaign on Twitter ( ) footer image

body:
Senate Democrats are pressuring President Trump to release his tax returns. Show you're standing with them on demanding answers.

[****](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1e2/2b07114c/5f66c5f9/736c08d5/3590940895/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-taxes?source=DPE-20170417-Signature_DS-ProsHV")
Team,

**Seventy four percent.**

That's the overwhelming majority of Americans who want Donald Trump to release his tax returns, according to a recent poll conducted by ABC and _The Washington Post_.

Trump and his spin-artist Kellyanne Conway claim that "people don't care" about the President's foreign business dealings. But we know that's simply not true.

[**So we 're going to prove to Donald Trump how many Americans want to see his tax returns. Tax Day is tomorrow -- add your voice to ours and demand that Trump release his taxes.**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e1e2/2b07114c/5f66c5f9/736c08d5/3590940895/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-taxes?source=DPE-20170417-Signature_DS-ProsHV")

Trump is the first president in 40 years not to release his tax returns. Keeping them a secret is a major violation of the American people's trust.

That's why Democratic senators introduced The Presidential Tax Transparency Act -- so Trump has to disclose his most recent filings for the public to see.

There are pressing answers we must discover, like what Trump's foreign business interests are and any conflicts of interests that could compromise his presidency.

**Add your name to send a strong message that Americans are demanding Donald Trump release his tax returns before Tax Day.**

subject: Does this sound fair to you, everyone?

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd7b/2a380d31/1592d459/fefcf6/2038249332/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")

Team,
For far too long, gerrymandered districts have rigged the map and silenced voters. Republican-drawn districts lock Democrats out of office and create a system where politicians pick their voters instead of voters picking their politicians.
**With Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans doing everything they can to gain more power, we have to make sure that every voice is heard.[Add your name to tell Congress to end gerrymandered districts.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd7b/2a380d31/1592d459/fefcf7/2038249332/VEsF/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/endgerrymandering/?code=Hassan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2F2017april_gerrymandering-ja%3Frefcode%3De20170417_gerrymanderja1_all")**
Partisan gerrymandering strips voters of their right to be fairly represented, and it creates the framework that gives the powerful even more power.
This issue isn't new -- in one of his last State of the Union addresses, President Obama called for an end to partisan gerrymandering because it allows politicians to cherry pick their voters and shore up seats for their party.
[**If you believe that we all deserve to have our voices heard, add your name to stand with President Obama and thousands of other Team Maggie members and tell Congress to end partisan gerrymandering.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd7b/2a380d31/1592d459/fefcf7/2038249332/VEsC/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/endgerrymandering/?code=Hassan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2F2017april_gerrymandering-ja%3Frefcode%3De20170417_gerrymanderja1_all")
